step.name: detect-agents
step.action: Run `which claude cursor`; capture versions; compare to minimum pins.

step.name: plant-agents-md
step.action: Copy/merge canonical `AGENTS.md` to repo root; compute SHA-256 checksum.

step.name: scope-tools
step.action: Write `.claude/settings.json` with team's allowedTools; reject wildcards.

step.name: smoke-task
step.action: Run smoke prompt; check response references real files.
